content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible slightly left of center, and the car appears well-positioned on the right side of the track following the curve.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 65, target index = (65+5) % 121 = 70
- Target WP70: x=2.7979, y=4.4950
- Car: x=3.5721, y=4.0882, heading=138.42°
- dy = 4.4950 - 4.0882 = 0.4068, dx = 2.7979 - 3.5721 = -0.7742
- bearing = atan2(0.4068, -0.7742) → second quadrant: atan(0.4068/0.7742) = 27.7°, bearing = 180° - 27.7° = **152.3°**
- delta = 152.3 - 138.42 = **+13.88°** → slight left

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.381m, distance_from_center = 0.0498m
- is_left_of_center = false, edge_distance = 0.381 - 0.0498 = 0.331m → clear
- No boundary override

Delta ~+13.9° → |delta| 5-15°, use steering_angle=+5, speed=1.5.

```json

  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead, delta=+13.9° to WP70 confirms gentle left correction needed; car is 0.050m right of center with 0.331m edge clearance, maintaining +5° steering at full speed.",

    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",

    "Car consistently ~0.05-0.10m right of center in WP55-70 section — no boundary concern.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >30°.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use minimal steering on near-straight sections to avoid oscillation.",
    "Southwestward bend WP55-70 is gentle; +5° steering tracks the curve well consistently.",
    "Delta stable around +13-14° in this section across multiple steps — +5° is correct choice."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [3.8210, 3.7217, 3.6881, 3.6405, 3.5721],

  },

```
